content: Daily standup: Just after v0.3 release. Starting security audit and v0.4 roadmap planning. Will delegate security audit to Kai and customer feedback collection to Nova.
Good morning team. This is PixelForge v0.4 release week. After yesterday's v0.3 release, I've asked Kai to start the security audit. Nova will begin collecting customer feedback.

{"to":"kai","intent":"delegation","content":"[Request] v0.3 Security Audit
Deadline: Tomorrow 18:00
Context: Need to close security gaps after the v0.3 release
Items to check: CSP, CORS, API rate limiting
Expected deliverable: Issue creation + PR submission
Please report completion on the Board."}

[Request] v0.3 Security Audit
Deadline: Tomorrow 18:00
Items to check: CSP, CORS, API rate limiting

{"to":"nova","intent":"delegation","content":"[Request] Customer Feedback Collection
Deadline: Today 18:00
Context: Want to gather customer voices after the v0.3 release
Expected deliverable: At least 3 major themes identified
Please report completion on the Board."}
summary: Delegated customer feedback collection to Nova

content: On it! I'll check all three — CSP, CORS, and API rate limiting. Will create issues and submit PRs.
Absolutely! I'll organize the support inquiry history and categorize by theme.

summary: Kai: security audit started. Nova: collecting feedback. On track.

content: Security audit started. Found 3 issues: CSP not configured, insufficient CORS restrictions, API rate limiting not implemented. Creating issues and starting PR work.

summary: Kai: working on CSP PR. Nova: analyzing feedback.

content: Customer feedback collection complete. From 12 inquiries, identified 3 major themes: (1) Export format expansion requests (2) AI generation quality improvement (3) More templates. Details documented in docs/.
Received Nova's customer feedback report. Will incorporate into the v0.4 roadmap. Key themes: export formats, AI quality, template expansion.

{"to":"ceo","intent":"report","content":"[Daily Report] v0.4 Planning Day 1

Progress:
- Kai: Security audit started. 3 issues identified (CSP/CORS/rate limiting)
- Nova: Customer feedback from 12 inquiries organized into 3 themes

Tomorrow's plan:
- Kai: Complete 3 security PRs
- Nova: Begin 5-company competitor analysis"}

summary: Day 1 complete. Security audit started, feedback collection done, roadmap planning begun.
